summary: QA accepts M7-LOCAL-ADMIN-GATE-001. The implementation adds a password-only local admin login, fail-closed auth/session helpers, protected admin UI and API middleware, logout, local-only docs/env guidance, and focused auth tests without signup/OAuth/users, new dependencies, package changes, Prisma changes, deployment, provider, or production auth scope creep.

acceptance_criteria_review.criterion: /login page exists for local single-admin workflow without signup/OAuth/users.
Server-side auth helper validates local admin password and issues/verifies session cookies without leaking secrets.
Middleware protects admin UI and admin APIs while allowing auth routes and static assets.
Logout clears the local session cookie.
README and .env.example document local-only variables and keep production auth/deployment human-gated.
Focused automated tests and required checks pass.

tests_run.result: PASS: Next build exited 0 with known nonfatal Windows SWC optional-native warnings.
PASS: no whitespace errors; LF-to-CRLF warnings only.

requested_action: Integrate, close, commit, push M7-LOCAL-ADMIN-GATE-001, then continue with M7-RADAR-TASK-UI-001.
